bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: 15 tests hardcoded 0.0 as initial faction value but FACTION_SCORE_START was changed to 20 (Neutre tier). Tests now reference MerlinConstants.FACTION_SCORE_START dynamically.
pick_minigame_for_field already uses randi() for randomization. Bug was filed against old hash-based code that was already replaced. Verified as already-fixed.

dead_code_removed.rationale: Creator directive q-20260414-005. Scenes not in active flow (IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC → ParchmentPreRun/HubAntre).

overall_assessment: All known bugs resolved. 15 total bugs fixed + 1 verified-already-fixed across 5 cycles. 2044 lines of dead scene code removed. Codebase clean for feature development.
